tangy-cucumber-slaw-for-tacos.name: Tangy Cucumber Slaw For Tacos

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Add cabbage, cucumber, red onion, and cilantro in a large bowl.
Whisk vinegar, oil, sugar, garlic, salt, and pepper together in a separate bowl. Add dressing to coleslaw mix. Let sit until flavors settle, at least 1 hour.

tequila-watermelon-punch.name: Tequila-watermelon Punch
instructions: If using watermelon as a punch bowl, cut a ½"-thick slice off the bottom so it will sit upright, then cut a 2"-thick slice off the top. Using a large metal spoon, scoop out flesh, being careful not to pierce the rind. To serve from a pitcher (easier!), cut away rind and slice flesh into 2" pieces.

Purée watermelon flesh and sugar in a blender until smooth and sugar is dissolved. Add 2 cups basil and blend on low speed until leaves are broken up, about 10 seconds (don’t overprocess). Let sit 15 minutes, then strain into a pitcher. Whisk in tequila and lemon juice; taste and add more sugar, if desired. Chill until cold, at least 1 hour and up to 4 hours.
Pour punch into watermelon set in a bowl of ice, or serve in ice-filled rocks glasses. Garnish with basil sprigs and lemon wheels.

teriyaki-chicken-skewers.name: Teriyaki Chicken Skewers
instructions: Preheat grill to medium heat.
Combine the chicken, soy sauce, brown sugar, sesame seeds, and green onions, stirring until evenly coated.
Chill and marinate for at least 2 hours.
Slide a piece of chicken down the skewer, alternating with the pineapple, until there is a 1-inch gap on the top of the skewer.
Repeat with the remaining chicken, pineapple, and skewers.
Grease the surface of the grill by rubbing the grates with tongs and an oiled paper towel.
Grill the skewers for about 12-18 minutes with the lid closed, flipping them halfway. Brush the skewers with the leftover marinade during grilling, if desired.
Enjoy!

thai-celery-salad-with-peanuts.name: Thai Celery Salad With Peanuts

ingredients.item: Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Whisk together oil, lime juice, and fish sauce. Toss with celery, scallions, chile, cilantro, and peanuts.

the-ba-muffuletta.name: The Ba Muffuletta

ingredients.item: Oil-packed calabrian chiles or 1 fresh fresno chile
Chopped drained piquillo peppers or roasted red peppers from a jar
Ciabatta loaf or other soft italian bread

instructions: Combine Calabrian chiles, shallot, garlic, both olives, piquillo peppers, oil, capers, vinegar, and oregano in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Olive salad can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Split bread in half along the equator line. Divide olive salad, including any liquid, between halves. Lay salami on bottom half of bread, followed by capocollo, provolone, mozzarella, mortadella, and prosciutto. Close sandwich and wrap tightly in plastic. Place between 2 baking sheets and weigh down with a heavy pot or two to flatten slightly. Let sit at room temperature, turning over halfway, 1–3 hours before cutting into wedges to serve.

the-easiest-tomato-soup.name: The Easiest Tomato Soup
instructions: Melted butter in  a large pot over medium heat. Add in the chopped onion and cook for 3-5 minutes or until translucent. 2. Add garlic paste and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add crushed tomatoes, chicken stock, and heavy cream and stir to combine. Bring to a boil then cover and reduce heat to low. Simmer for 15 minutes until slightly thickened.
Transfer to a blender or use an immersion blender to blend until smooth.
Garnish with basil and serve.
Enjoy!

thumbprint-cookies.name: Thumbprint Cookies

ingredients.prep: such as raspberry, strawberry, or apricot, divided

instructions: Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat oven to 350°. Line 2 large, rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper.
Sift 2½ cups (313 g) all-purpose flour, ¼ tsp. baking soda, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt into a large bowl. Set aside.

Beat 1 cup (2 sticks) unsalted butter, room temperature, and ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment (or in a large mixing bowl with a hand mixer) on medium speed, scraping bowl occasionally, until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes (4 minutes if using a hand mixer). Add 1 large egg and 1 tsp. vanilla extract; beat until fully incorporated, about 1 minute. With mixer on low, add dry ingredients in stages, beating until just combined. Shape dough into a disk, wrap in plastic, and chill at least 1 hour and up to 24.

Roll the dough into 1" balls and arrange on prepared baking sheets, leaving about 3" between cookies. Using your thumb, the round end of a small pestle, or the bottom of a measuring spoon, make a well in the center of each dough ball. Fill each indentation with ½ tsp. jam from ½ cup jam, such as raspberry, strawberry, or apricot, being careful not to overfill. Bake, switching cookie sheets between upper and lower racks about halfway through baking, until thumbprints are golden, about 15 minutes.

Cool thumbprints on baking sheets for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely. Dust with powdered sugar. Bake remaining cookie dough on cool baking sheets.
Do ahead: Thumbprint cookies can be baked 3 days ahead. Cool completely, then store in an airtight container at room temperature.
Editor’s note: This recipe was originally printed in November 2011 as Siobhan’s Thumbprint Cookies. Head this way for more of our all-time-best Christmas cookie recipes →

to-love-chicken-thighs-and-couscous.name: To-love Chicken Thighs And Couscous

ingredients.item: Plus 1 tbsp. apple cider vinegar or red wine vinegar
Plus  0.5 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 3 Tbsp. sugar, ¼ cup apple cider vinegar or red wine vinegar, and 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl until sugar and salt are mostly dissolved. Whisk in 1 Tbsp. onion powder, 2 tsp. garlic powder, 2 tsp. paprika, and 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil.

Pour marinade into a large resealable plastic bag. Add 1½ lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs (about 6), close bag, and turn to coat. Let sit at room temperature 15 minutes, or chill, turning occasionally, up to 12 hours.

Meanwhile, heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high. Add 1 cup Israeli couscous and cook, stirring to coat, until golden brown, 1–2 minutes. Carefully pour in 1¼ cups water and add ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt; stir well. Bring to a boil; immediately reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer until tender, 8–10 minutes. Remove lid, gently fluff, and let sit to allow excess moisture to evaporate.

Meanwhile, prepare grill for medium-high heat; oil grate with vegetable oil. Brush 2 medium ears of corn, shucked, with olive oil; grill, turning often, until tender and charred in spots, 7–9 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let cool. Cut kernels from corn cobs and place in a medium bowl.

Remove chicken from marinade, letting excess drip back into
bag. Grill, reducing heat or moving to a cooler spot if charring too quickly, until
cooked through and well browned, about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to cutting board and
let rest 10 minutes.

Add 12 oz. cherry tomatoes, halved, and Israeli couscous to corn and toss to combine. Drizzle in remaining 1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar or red wine vinegar and 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, season with salt and freshly ground pepper, and toss again. Transfer couscous salad to a platter. Finely grate zest from 1 lemon over, then cut lemon into wedges. Season salad with more pepper.

Slice chicken and arrange over salad. Top with basil leaves and serve with lemon wedges.
To make without a grill: Heat broiler. Place a wire rack inside a foil-lined rimmed baking sheet. Brush rack with vegetable oil. Place corn on rack; broil until tender and charred in spots, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to cutting board; let rest. Remove chicken from marinade, letting excess drip back into bag, and arrange, smoother side up, on same rack. Broil, turning once, until golden brown, 12–14 minutes.

toast-with-tomato-jam-boquerones-and-lem.name: Toast With Tomato Jam, Boquerones, And Lemon Oil

ingredients.prep: zest removed in wide strips, thinly sliced lengthwise

ingredients.item: -inch-thick baguette slices cut on a diagonal

ingredients.prep: dark-green parts only, thinly sliced on a steep diagonal

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Using a paring knife, score a shallow X on the bottom of each tomato. Working in batches, cook tomatoes in a large ovenproof pot of boiling water just until skins at X begin to peel back, 15–30 seconds. Using a slotted spoon, transfer tomatoes to a bowl of ice water and let cool. Peel tomatoes. Remove cores, then halve lengthwise and scrape out seeds. Transfer tomatoes back to pot, crushing with your hands. Mix in ¼ cup oil, cover, and bake until tomatoes are slightly darkened and very soft, 2–3 hours.
Transfer pot to stovetop, uncover, and cook over medium-low, stirring occasionally, until deep red and thickened, 45–70 minutes; season with salt. Transfer to an airtight container and let cool.
While tomatoes are baking, heat lemon zest and ¼ cup oil in a small saucepan over low 5 minutes. Let cool.
Spoon about 1 Tbsp. tomato jam over top of each toast. Top each with a boquerone and anchovy fillet; drizzle with lemon oil and scatter scallion tops over.
Do Ahead: Tomato jam can be made 5 days ahead; cover and chill. Lemon oil can be made 2 weeks ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

tofu-summer-rolls.name: Tofu Summer Rolls

ingredients.prep: such as Little Gem or romaine hearts
halved lengthwise, seeded, sliced into half moons
mint leaves, and sweet chili sauce (for serving)

instructions: Preheat oven to 400º. Place tofu on a paper towel-lined rimmed baking sheet. Top tofu with 2 more layers of paper towels and place a heavy skillet on top. Let drain 15 minutes. Remove paper towels and slice tofu into ½" batons. Toss tofu with soy sauce and vegetable oil on baking sheet; season with salt. Roast tofu, tossing once, until golden brown, 20–25 minutes. Drizzle with sesame oil and toss to coat.
Serve tofu with lettuce, carrots, cucumbers, lime wedges, mint, and chili sauce alongside. Assemble just before eating.
Do Ahead: Tofu can be roasted 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

tomato-bread.name: Tomato Bread
instructions: Heat tomato juice and water in a saucepan over low heat until warm to the touch; pour into a large warmed bowl. Add yeast and honey; stir to dissolve yeast. Allow to rest until yeast is creamy, about 10 minutes.
Mix in oil, parsley, onion, garlic, carrot, and salt. Add 1 cup of the flour, and stir until smooth. Add more flour, until a firm dough is formed. Knead five minutes on a lightly floured surface.
Place dough in a greased bowl, and turn to coat the surface completely. Allow to rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour. Grease two 9x5-inch loaf pans.

Punch down dough and turn out onto a lightly floured surface; divide dough in half. Form two loaves and place in prepared loaf pans. Allow to rise until loaves have doubled in size, another 45 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (220 degrees C). Bakes loaves in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 30 minutes. Remove loaves from pans and transfer to a wire rack to cool.

tomato-salad-lezzet.name: Tomato Salad
instructions: 1. Take tomatoes in a bowl of iris, onions ring choppers.
2. Mix the soy sauce and olive oil in a bowl.
3. Discover and serve salads.

tomatoes-roasted-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Tomatoes Roasted In The Oven
instructions: To make the cherry tomatoes in the evening like a sundae, heat the evening to 170°3.
Lightly grease a sheet with a brush.
Wash well and dry the tomatoes.
Cut them in half along.
Line the oiled sheet with the cut side upwards.
In a bowl, add the garlic and olive oil.
Mix them with a fork.
With a brush, brush the tomatoes with garlic.
Sprinkle them with salt, freshly ground pepper and chopped herbs.
Finally, sprinkle with some sugar.
Bake them for 35 minutes at 150
Allow the baked tomatoes to cool and place in a jar.
Cover them up with olive oil.
Seal the jar with lid and keep them in the refrigerator.
See here how to properly sterilize your jars.

torn-potatoes-with-chile-lime-butter.name: Torn Potatoes With Chile-lime Butter

ingredients.prep: coarsely chopped, seeds removed if desired

ingredients.item: . potatoes of mixed colors and similar sizes (such as sweet
ingredients.prep: purple sweet, russet, and/or yukon gold), scrubbed

ingredients.item: Lime wedges and flaky sea salt

instructions: Pulse chile and cilantro in a food processor until finely chopped. Add butter, lime zest, and kosher salt and pulse until smooth. Transfer to a sheet of parchment paper and roll into a 6"-long log. Chill until firm, at least 2 hours and up to 3 days.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Arrange potatoes in an even layer on a rimmed baking sheet and cover tightly with foil. Roast 40 minutes. Remove foil (save for later!), turn potatoes, and continue to roast, uncovered, until largest potato is very tender when pierced with a paring knife or fork, 20–30 minutes.

Unwrap chile-lime butter and thinly slice crosswise. Using two forks, tear potatoes (including skins) into 3"–4" pieces. Transfer to a large (preferably warmed) platter. Using your hands, crumble and scatter butter over potatoes (yes, use all of the butter). Cover with reserved foil and let sit until butter is mostly melted, 3–4 minutes. Top with pomegranate arils, squeeze lime juice over, and sprinkle with sea salt.

tortilla-soup.name: Tortilla Soup

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: or 2 cups frozen, thawed corn kernels
halved cherry tomatoes, avocado wedges, queso fresco or mild fetat

instructions: Bring chicken, onion, carrot, garlic, chipotles, jalapeño, and 16 cups water to a boil in a large pot; skim foam from surface. Reduce heat to medium and simmer, skimming the surface frequently, until chicken is cooked through, about 1 hour.

Transfer chicken to a plate. Strain broth into another large pot. Return chiles to broth, if a spicier broth is desired; discard remaining solids. Shred chicken meat; discard skin and bones. Transfer chicken meat to a medium bowl and set aside.

Meanwhile, set pot with strained broth over medium heat and add cilantro sprigs. Bring broth to a simmer; cook until reduced to 8 cups, about 1 hour. Discard sprigs and chiles, if using. Stir in 3 Tbsp. lime juice. Season with salt, pepper, and more lime juice, if desired. Add chicken to broth. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 days ahead. Chill until cold, then cover and keep chilled.

Attach deep-fry thermometer to the side of a large cast-iron skillet or other heavy skillet. Pour oil into skillet to a depth of 1". Heat over medium heat until thermometer registers 350°–360°. Working in batches, fry tortilla strips, turning occasionally, until crisp and golden brown, 2–3 minutes per batch. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to paper towels to drain. Season with salt.

Cook corn over a gas flame or under a broiler, turning occasionally, until charred in spots. Let stand until cool enough to handle. Cut kernels from cobs in strips. Discard cobs. (Alternatively, cook kernels in a large skillet over high heat until charred in spots.)
Rewarm broth with chicken. Divide soup among bowls. Top generously with corn, tortilla strips, cilantro, tomatoes, avocado, and crumbled queso fresco.

traditional-cabbage-rolls-argiro.name: Traditional Cabbage Rolls

ingredients.item: 500 grits mixed (ari and pork or beef and pork)
500 grits mixed (ari and pork or beef and pork)

instructions: Clean the outer leaves from the cabbage and remove the stem with a knife.
Simmer the cabbage, with the hole that left the stem down, in a boiling pot of water. We make sure the water half covers the cabbage.
Boil for 7-10 minutes to soften slightly, and leave on a platter to cool.

traditional-chili-with-ground-turkey.name: Traditional Chili With Ground Turkey
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat; stir in ground turkey. Cook and stir until turkey is crumbly, evenly browned, and no longer pink. Drain and discard any excess grease.

Stir in onion, bell peppers, and jalapeños; cook and stir until onion softened and translucent, about 8 minutes. Add garlic, cumin, chili powder, sugar, salt, black pepper, and thyme. Continue to cook until fragrant, about 8 more minutes, stirring occasionally.

Stir in beef broth, pinto beans, red beans, diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, and tomato paste. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low. Simmer until thickened, about 45 minutes, stirring occasionally. For a thinner chili, cover the pot when simmering.

traditional-cod-brandade-comedera.name: Traditional Cod Brandade

ingredients.item: 1/5  de litro de aceite de oliva suave

instructions: To start with, we'll make sure that the cod's drained and dry. We'll remove the skin and if so, thorns or other parts that interferes with the soft texture of his flesh, as well as beards.
If you decide to use the parsley, we have to wash them very well and then get them quite finely. We'll keep them in a small cup for decoration at the end of this recipe.
To continue, we will peel the garlic and mince it very finely, whether it's sheets or notebooks. It's better if you can shredder them.

Then we'll warm up a good frying pan or case with an oil jet, to fry the garlic we come from peeling and cutting. The fire shouldn't be high, because the idea is that the garlic will get slightly cold. We don't want her to get attached or burned.

When we see that garlic starts to cook, we'll have cod incorporated into cooking. We'll let them cook only what's necessary to soften (about 3 minutes, normally). Then we'll get everything out of the fire.
We'll get the cod out of the frying and crumbling with the help of a fork. To achieve smaller crumbs, we can use a mortar.
In the case of oil and garlic, we'll separate them. We will use a drainer to remove the pieces and save them for later. The oil will be clear for us to re-use at another step of the recipe.

Now we're going to put the cod meat back into a bowl and we're going to put the oil from the old frying, still hot. The goal is that fish sucks or absorbs fat and we start to emulsify our pits. To do this we will help ourselves with a mixer, or whoever wants them can do so manually.

Batiremos un poco y luego, agregaremos un chorrito de la leche.  Batiremos de nuevo hasta mezclar todo, y entonces alternaremos con un hilo de aceite. Continuaremos el proceso batiendo y alternando ambos ingredientes, hasta que los dos se terminen y logremos una consistencia espesa.

The following will be to sedate our preparations. To this end, we will add a touch of dusted nut. We'll mix well and we'll test the fringes to check the date. If necessary, we will correct it with a touch of salt, and we will mix them back to fully integrate.
Acomoda la brandada en un recipiente para servir. Recupera los trocitos de ajo fritos para espolvorear la superficie del plato, y haz lo mismo con el perejil picado, si decidiste utilizarlo.
That's all. The cod frilling with slice of roasted bread can be accompanied.

traditional-colombian-christmas-fritters.name: Traditional Colombian Christmas Fritters

ingredients.item: 200 g of yuca starch (you can buy here)
250 g of grated coastal cheese, or blend of fresh and Feta cheese (you can buy here)
Opcional: una pizca de bicarbonato (ayuda a esponjar)

instructions: To start with, mix into a big bowl the 250 g of yucca starch, the 250 g of frosted coastal cheese, the 2 tablespoons of sugar, the teaspoon of salt and the teaspoon of chemical yeast.
In another bowl beat the egg and add it to the dry ingredients.

He starts integrating with his hands and sees his milk put up with him and put his milk up and down and down and down till you get a smooth and smooth mass. It should be tender, nonsticky and capable of making smooth balls. If you see that it looks dry, add an extra chorrit of milk and if you have passed, a little more starch and balance soon.

When the dough is ready, it forms balls the size of an appendage. Be sure to get them round and out of frying, because that's quite an influence on how good they are and how they don't get to frying them.

Put a pot or deep paddle onto the fire with enough oil to get the fringes floating. Warm at a medium-high temperature but not at best. A simple trick to check if it's ready is to put a small ball of dough: if it goes down and goes up slowly, it's perfect. If you come up at once, put the fire down a little.

Fry fringes in small tands so they don't pile up. You'll see that as they cook, they get inflamed and they start to get quite even. Turn them every once in a while with a mocha. The process usually takes a few minutes and as soon as you see them from a pretty gilt, get them out and let them run onto paper.
Let them rest for a second and... you have them. Crunching outside, soft inside and with that characteristic salty spot.

traditional-yogurt-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Traditional Yogurt Pudding
instructions: Prepare the caramel: pour the sugar into a frying pan, soak it with a little water and bring it to the fire, letting it boil until you get a caramel. Add the water, remove from the fire and caramelize the interior in a way. Reserve.
Boil the milk with the remaining sugar, remove from the fire and reserve. In a bowl, beat the eggs with the yogurts, then add the milk and stir well.
Lay the prepared in caramelized form and take it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, in a sea bath, for 40 minutes. Let it cool and unshape.

trinidad-curry-powder.name: Trinidad Curry Powder
instructions: Break open the cardamom pods, remove the seeds, and discard the pods.

Place the cardamom seeds, coriander, seeds, cumin seeds, mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, and curry leaves in a heavy frying pan and toast, swirling for about 5 minutes, until the spices begin to release their aromas.
Place the toasted spices in a food processor or spice grinder and add the peppercorns and cloves. Grind the mixture to a find powder. Stir in the turmeric.
Store in an airtight container. If stored properly, curry powder will keep for at least two months.

triple-chocolate-mousse-argiro.name: Triple Chocolate Mousse

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of liquid vanilla or 2 capsules of vanilla
1 large gelatine leaf of 5 g or two small
White, milk and bitter mixed chocolate
2 tablespoons of liquid vanilla or 2 capsules of vanilla
1 large gelatine leaf of 5 g or two small
White, milk and bitter mixed chocolate

instructions: Heat the 250 g cream first in a pot until steaming.
In three bowls separate in ben marie, melt the three chocolates. We're coming down from the fire.
In bowls, add the yolks, sugar, vanilla and salt and homogenize with wire.
With thread flow and stirring, add the hot cream to the eggs.
Add the cream to the pot over low heat with continued stirring and leave for about 4′-5′. If we have a thermometer, it's 71oC.
After the cream is simmered, lower from the heat, dry the gelatin and add it.
Mix well to dissolve. For smoother texture, we pass the cream from thin screen.
Balance the cream in the chocolates, homogenize and leave on the counter to cool well.
Beat the rest of the cream in thick form.
Dilute each chocolate with 2 tablespoons of cream and balance the rest of the whipped cream. Gently mix.
Place the mousse in layers either in individual glasses or in bowls and serve with ice cream broom and chocolate rolls.
It is necessary to freeze well in the refrigerator and tighten.

tropeiro-beans-teleculinaria.name: Tropeiro Beans
instructions: Numa frigideira, estrele os ovos num pouco de azeite, retire com uma escumadeira e reserve.

Cut the bacon into cubes and sausages into slices, take them to the fire in a pot and let them saute until they get a good color. Then add the chopped onion and let it saute well. Add the fried eggs and chopped corianders and stir very well.
Drain the beans, mix in the previous preparation and then wrap the cassava flour. Let cook a little, season with salt and pepper and serve with coriander leaves.

tuna-sandwich-with-egg-recipe-comedera.name: Tuna Sandwich With Egg: Recipe
tuna-sandwich-with-egg-recipe-comedera.original_name: Sandwich de atún con huevo: receta fácil
instructions: Cooking 1 egg in a pot with water. Do it for 10 minutes.
When ready, remove his skin under cold water and cut them into slices.
Open half the ciabatta and put them in the oven or a frying pan with a soft heat to get them hot and tipsy. Keep an eye out.
Drain 1 can of tuna.
To put together the sandwich's very easy: simply get one of the halves of bread and put mayonnaise to taste.
Luego ponle algunas hojas de lechuga y la cebolla morada picada en julianas.
Now you'll put up his tin tuna, well distributed by his bread.
Luego ponle las rodajas del huevo sancochado.
Ahora simplemente pon la otra mitad del pan por arriba.
That's right, you have a delicious and very nutritious sandwich. Enjoy.

turkey-chili-recipe-light-comforting-fla.name: Turkey Chili Recipe - Light, Comforting Flavor
turkey-chili-recipe-light-comforting-fla.original_name: Receta fácil de chili de pavo: sabor ligero y reconfortante

ingredients.item: 500 g de pechuga de pavo molida
1  lata de frijoles rojos (escurridos y enjuagados)

instructions: Warm olive oil in a large pot with medium heat. Add onion and garlic, cooking till soft and transparent.
Incorpora la pechuga de pavo molida, cocinando hasta que se dore uniformemente.
Add minced red pepper and cook for a few minutes.
Sprinkle the cumin, chili powder and sweet pimenton onto the mixture, stirring well.
Incorpora los tomates picados y los frijoles rojos.
Fold the chicken broth and get the mixture drunk. It reduces fire and keeps cooking at low heat for 25-30 minutes.
Ajusta el sabor con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Ya tienes listo tu chili de pavo.

turkey-meatloaf-muffins.name: Turkey Meatloaf Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a muffin tin with cooking spray.
Combine ground turkey, Cheddar cheese, onion, bread crumbs, milk, eggs, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, salt, and pepper in a large bowl; mix well with your hands.
Drop scoops of the turkey mixture into the muffin tin using a large ice cream scoop.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 45 minutes.

two-color-cookies-argiro.name: Two-color Cookies

ingredients.item: 2 medium eggs beaten (100 g eggs without shell)
2 tablespoons vanilla extract or vanilla capsule
2 medium eggs beaten (100 g eggs without shell)
2 tablespoons vanilla extract or vanilla capsule

instructions: All materials must be at room temperature.
In fact, we make the same dough for both flavors.
And in the end, in the final dough, divide it into two pieces in two different bowls. Add 30 g of flour and add 30 g of cocoa so that it is malleable and soft without sticking to the hands.
Shake the flour (350 g) with baking powder & soda. Leave them aside.
In a bowl, add the powder sugar and soft butter.
Mix with a soft spatula until the powder melts in the butter.
Add the crystalline sugar, eggs, zest and vanilla and mix well to homogenize.
Add the sifted ingredients, flour with baking and soda.
Fold to get the flour into the ingredients.
The dough at this stage is very soft and sticky. Her weight is 750 gr.
Divide it into two parts of 375 gr.
Add 30 g of sifted cocoa and add 30 g of sifted flour.
Gently knead until the flour is lost in one dough and cocoa in the other.
Now we can make them separately with vanilla flavor and separately with chocolate.
But we can knit the two yeasts and make two-colored ones. .

4th-of-july-dump-cake.name: 4th Of July Dump Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).
Layer cherry pie filling, blueberries, cake mix, melted butter, and nuts in a 9x12-inch baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
